title: C OSCORE cannot produce/consume response-with-own-PIV (RFC C.8 shape) - no protected Observe notifications
description: oscore_protect_response hardcodes an empty OSCORE option (oscore.c:1861 opt={0}) and oscore_unprotect_response explicitly ignores the response OSCORE option (oscore.c:1889-1890 '(void)oscore_opt'). So the Zephyr node can neither send nor process responses carrying their own Partial IV - i.e. no OSCORE-protected Observe notifications (each notification needs a fresh PIV). Rust has include_piv support; Python/aiocoap handles both shapes. Fix: thread an include_piv/seq path into protect_response and parse the response option in unprotect_response, then verify against RFC C.8 vectors.
